title: lobelia drungjiangensis
intro: Lobelia drungjiangensis, also known as Peking lobelia or Chinese lobelia, is a plant species native to China, belonging to the Lobelia family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving cardiovascular health. Lobelia drungjiangensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
